text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian wins the Kikuka Sho. She's come such
a long way.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After, she and Hishi Amazon confirm their battle
at the Arima Kinen is still on.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, Narita Brian sets her sights on the
Arima Kinen to settle the score with Hishi
Amazon!
